title: The Battle for the Baratie Escalates
description: On pages 9–12, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: So the grand line is teeming with guys like him...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'll send ungrateful crooks like you flying!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Planning on fighting here where you can't even stand properly?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: I've heard that devil fruit users are weak against the sea...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I can't swim but in return, I can stretch!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you don't wanna die, then get the hell out of our way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The... the restaurant's head is moving!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Yer the one who has to pedal faster if we wanna turn left!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Yeah, I know, dumbass! Just shut the hell up, you bald-headed freak!

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
